calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES
Off Calendar Sep-09-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for (administrator) Norma Jerry. Court Appointed counsel Andrew Schultz for (conservatee) Norma Jerry.

Mr. Schultz stated that he had nothing additional to add. Mr. Vann stated that he submitted a proposed order consistent with Mr. Schultz' pleading. The Court granted the petition for accounting (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES
Off Calendar Aug-03-2015 Continued To Aug-24-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES
Off Calendar Jul-01-2015 Continued To Aug-03-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Andrew Schultz for Norma Jerry as beneficiary; Dennis Vann for Norma Jerry as Petitioner.

The Court inquired whether the Petition for Instructions should be bifurcated. Mr. Schultz
responded in the affirmative, and stated that the decedent's will was a holographic will with all kinds of useful information in addition to her instructions, such as burial instructions, insurance information, etc., and contended that the language regarding the gift of cash should be interpreted as a general gift of all cash, not limited to the specific accounts listed which she held at the time of making the will. Mr. Vann confirmed that there were other accounts at Citibank in addition to those listed in the will. The Court agreed to bifurcate the issue of the Petition for Instructions.
The Court requested that the issue regarding the signing of documents by Ms. Bibbs be addressed. Mr. Vann stated that he had prepared the petition and signed the verification, believing an attorney verification was appropriate. He was surprised when the Probate Examiner noted that the verification be by his client, who is unable to provide the verification. Mr. Vann stated that another issue is what will be done with the car. He stated that it is 40 years old, doesn't run, has no value and no buyer can be found. He stated that under the terms of the will, it goes to Norma Jerry. Addressing the question of costs, Mr. Vann stated that a declaration was filed on January 20, 2015, which itemizes the costs advanced on behalf of the estate.
The Court indicated that there were issues raised regarding the distribution to be made.
Mr. Vann responded that the distribution issues were premature while the decision on the decision of the petition for instructions remained pending. Mr. Schultz agreed that the petition for instructions should be ruled on first, and the remaining petition continued to a later date.
The Petition for Instructions was taken under submission. The Accounting Petition was continued to August 3, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of The Estate
Off Calendar Jan-13-2015 Continued To Jan-27-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for Norma Jerry.

Mr. Vann stated that he completed the accounting yesterday and asked for a two week continuance to complete the petition. Status of administration was continued to January 27, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy S. Park. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of The Estate
Off Calendar Nov-18-2014 Continued To Jan-13-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for Norma Jerry.

Mr. Vann stated that he has all of the bank statements but that he does not have the cancelled checks, that he believes there are four and that the funds were used for the funeral and the bond, that the only thing left is the bank account and questioned whether Ms. Bibbs could file a waiver of accounting. Status of the estate was continued to January 13, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of The Estate
Off Calendar Oct-14-2014 Continued To Nov-18-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of The Estate
Off Calendar Sep-23-2014 Continued To Oct-14-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for Norma Jerry.

The Court questioned if Ms. Bibbs could petition to be appointed with representation by other Counsel. Mr. Vann stated that he represents Ms. Bibbs as Conservator of Ms. Jerry and spoke of the Court's prior concerns with regard to conflict. Mr. Vann also stated that there is a possibility of a Niece petitioning. Status of the Estate was continued to October 14, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Probate Examiner will contact Counsel and the Public Guardian.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of The Estate
Off Calendar Aug-26-2014 Continued To Sep-23-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for Norma Jerry. Andrew Schultz Court appointed Counsel for Norma Jerry in the Conservatorship matter.

The Court raised the issue of conflict of Mr. Vann's representation of Ms. Bibbs. Mr. Vann stated that he represents Ms. Bibbs for appointment in the conservatorship. Mr. Schultz stated that his Client could think it is an issue, that it is probably a good idea to have someone else, that he has spoken with his Client and she wanted him to tell the Court that she is thinking about it. Mr. Schultz also stated that his Client is very private, that she has no one, that Ms. Bibbs is trying very hard to build a relationship, that Ms. Jerry is still uncomfortable with Ms. Bibbs and that Ms. Jerry has no one she could propose. Status of the Estate was continued to September 23, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for the Court to invite the Public Administrator to come in on the matter. Mr. Vann advised the Court that the house is subject to an 850 Petition and stated that there was approximately $68,000.00 in the Estate and is now down to $48,000.00 due to funeral expenses.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

Petition For Order Declaring That Real Property Held In Decedent;S Name Is Owned By Petitioner And Order Directing The Administratior To Execute A Deed To Said Property To Petitioner.
Off Calendar Jul-23-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for and with Norma Jerry (Personal Representative). Greer Smith for and with Cecilia Hernandez. Paula Bibbs conservator of Norma Jerry also present.

The Court stated that it reviewed and read all of the documents. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order). The Court noted that Ms. Jerry is now under a conservatorship and informed Mr. Vann that he needs to take some steps to substitute someone in for Ms. Jerry. Mr. Vann stated that the only thing left is $45,000.00 and that they may be able to do a 13100. Status of the estate was set for August 26, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
